title: 12 Card Capture
body_text:
12	Card Capture
12.1	Requested Capture
Financial institutions with ATMs linked to the
Interac
Â®
or THE EXCHANGE
Â®
networks are required to capture any card requested by the issuer.
Destroy all captured credit cards, chip cards, and debit (ATM) cards in dual custody.
Keep a log of all destroyed cards for audit purposes, according to your financial institutionâs internal policy.
Note:	Donât send captured cards to Central 1.
12.2	Accidental Capture
If your financial institutionâs ATM accidentally captures cards for any reason, you can return the cards to cardholders upon satisfactory proof of identification.
If the cardholder doesnât request the cardâs return during the business day following the day of capture,
Destroy all captured credit cards, chip cards, and debit (ATM) cards.
Keep a log of all destroyed cards for audit purposes, according to your financial institutionâs internal policy.
Note:	Donât send captured cards to Central 1.
END
